ads_items.title: Seed data source pack planning
ads_items.notes: Seed source planning boundary and seed pack catalogue recorded.

ads_items.title: Source authority seed data
ads_items.notes: Source authority draft pack generated, validated, inserted and verified.

ads_items.title: Panchanga master seed data
ads_items.notes: Basic Panchanga master sample/foundation inserted. Full 30 tithi, 27 nakshatra, yoga, karana and full rashi production corpus remains future expansion.

ads_items.title: Regional rule-profile seed data
ads_items.notes: North India, East India/Bihar/Mithila and South Panchangam scaffolds recorded. Full regional rule-profile depth remains future expansion.

ads_items.title: Word/Sutra/Reflection corpus seed data
ads_items.notes: Basic word/reflection/mantra review and claim-risk seed foundation exists. Rich corpus expansion remains future work.

ads_items.title: Guidance/Star Reflection rule seed data
ads_items.notes: Rule scaffolds and safety boundaries exist. Full guidance/star-reflection rule data should be implemented in AG guidance/reflection modules after AG47 return.

ads_items.title: Daily Panchang generation/loading strategy
ads_items.notes: Runtime route, dry-run scope, formula validation and non-public package boundary are recorded. No generation/loading has been executed.

ads_items.title: Seed validation and public-use audit
ads_items.notes: Seed validation, public-use false defaults, no-public activation, no-runtime and no-secret audits recorded.

ads_items.title: Website starts reading from database
ads_items.notes: Website database reading/API runtime remains explicitly deferred. No public database read path is activated.
